# Accredian Enterprise

> Accredian Enterprise is India's leading Gen AI & L&D corporate training provider, delivering customized upskilling programs for enterprise teams in technology, product, digital transformation, and leadership domains.

## Key Facts

- 10,000+ professionals trained across enterprise organizations
- Clients include Reliance, HCL, IBM, ADP, CRIF, and Bayer
- Programs range 8–12 weeks, cohort-based, live instructor-led
- Corporate AI training costs: INR 1.5L–4L (awareness workshops), INR 8L–25L (role-specific cohorts)
- Institutional partnerships: IITs, IIMs, XLRI, SP Jain
- Proprietary CAT Framework: Concept → Application → Tools (3-stage training model)

## What We Do

- Gen AI bootcamps and LLM training for corporate teams
- Skill gap analysis using the CAT (Concept, Application, Tools) framework
- Cohort-based upskilling in Data Science, AI, Product Management, and Leadership
- CXO and senior leadership elevation programs (4–6 months)
- Digital transformation and Fintech training programs
- ROI dashboards and post-training competency tracking

## Who We Serve

- CHROs, CLOs, L&D leaders at mid-size and large enterprises
- Tech teams (engineering, data, product) needing AI upskilling
- Senior leadership teams undergoing digital transformation
- Organizations in BFSI, IT/ITES, Manufacturing, and Consulting sectors
